title: Lu Xun | Chinese Writer & Revolutionary Thinker
author: Encyclopaedia Britannica
evidence_summary: Provides a concise, editor-reviewed biographical scaffold: dates, pen name, major works, New Culture context, later essay writing, and the recurring description of Lu Xun as a sharp critic of both tradition and modern conditions.
notes: Reference-only source for factual grounding and chronology. Do not redistribute article text; keep usage to citation, metadata, and short internal synthesis.
